g.text: These are the packages that would be merged, in order:
The advanced, extensible, customizable, self-documenting edito
EmACT, a fork of Conroy's MicroEmacs
UNIX compatible IRC bot programmed in C
Advanced CLI tool for sending email
A high-level Emacs Lisp RDBMS front-end
a simple code editor for GNUstep
acl alsa cairo dbus gif gmp gpm gtk gui inotify jpeg
lcms png sound ssl svg systemd threads tiff webp xattr xft xpm zlib -Xaw3d
Free MPEG-4 audio codecs by AudioCoding.com
Free lossless audio encoder and decoder
GTK+ utility for editing MP2, MP3, MP4, FLAC, Ogg and other me
The advanced, extensible, customizable, self-documenting editor
GPL-3+, FDL-1.3+, Boost-1.0, BSD, CC-BY-SA-3.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0, HPND, MIT, MPL-2.0,
